heading: Report on United States humanitarian assistance
label: 7831 Report on United States humanitarian assistance

children.text: all activities to provide humanitarian assistance inside North Korea, and to North Koreans outside of North Korea, that receive United States funding;

any improvements in humanitarian transparency, monitoring, and access inside North Korea during the previous 1-year period, including progress toward meeting the conditions identified in subparagraphs (A) through (D) of ; andsection 7832(b)(1) of this title

specific efforts to secure improved humanitarian transparency, monitoring, and access inside North Korea made by the United States and United States grantees, including the World Food Program, during the previous 1-year period.

children.heading: Needs assessment
children.label: b Needs assessment
children.text: The report shall include a needs assessment to inform the distribution of humanitarian assistance inside North Korea.

children.heading: Form
children.label: c Form
children.text: The information required by subsection (a)(1) may be provided in classified form if necessary.
